problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
